titleStmt.title: SII 30.204: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 204. (A.R. No. 280 of 1915.) Kaḍalūr, Villupuram Taluk, South Arcot District Agnīsvara temple-on five other detached stones lying in the same place Achyutadēva-Mahārāya: ••• : 16th c. A.D.

summary.p: This records a gift of village [Attippidavai Namasivaya]nallur for performing worship on the occation of Makarasaṅkrama in the temple of Tiruvakkisvaramuḍaiya Tambirānār, for the merit of Irumaḍi Tirumalai Nāyakkar under the instruction of Nāmaśivāya Nāyakkar by certain Jagatappi Koṇḍirāsa, Kaḍaikkūṭṭu Nāchchiyaṇar. (See above 276 of 1915).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śvaśtiśrī . manmakāmaṇṭaliśvara Accutaiya
makārāyarkku cellā niṉṟa vikuṟuti varuṣam makaracaṅkiṟama puṇṇiya kālattile
yivūr Uṭaiyār tiruvakkiśvaramuṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku poṟṟu pūcaikku I
rumaṭi tirumalai nāyakkar taṉmamāka namacivāya nāyakkar Appiṇaipaṭikku ceka
tāppi koṇṭirācāvum kaṭaikkūṭṭu nācciaṇarum Attippiṭavai namacivāya ṭanallūrki
ṟāmam Oṉṟum tārāpūṟuvamā raivāttamaikku yituve taṉmacātanamā kku Akitam niṉaittaper keṅkaik �ṉṟa toṣattile pokakaṭave ṇakkaḷ coṟpaṭikku koyil kaṇa ṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.204 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
